title: Its Official!  Cavallo Boots the World!
text: Cavallo President Carole Herder announced today that Cavallo Hoof Boots are now the Official Hoof Boots of three riding associations: American Competitive Trail Horse Association (ACTHA), Australian Trail Horse Riders Association (ATHRA) and the British Horse Society UK TREC division, plus the hugely popular TV program Best Of America By Horseback (BOABH) shown on RFD TV across the USA. Carole commented that this official endorsement was very pleasing to the Cavallo team. It is a very strong endorsement of Cavallo Hoof Boots acceptance within the worldwide horse riding community. The focus of all these companies is in recreational trail riding where Cavallo products have been a leader since 1993 when Cavallo launched their Total Comfort System saddle pads. Carole said, "It is wonderful to have these well-respected organizations endorse Cavallo Hoof Boots as their Official Hoof Boots. There has been massive acceptance in our industry that barefoot is best. And of course, when we want to ride with our extra weight and the tack, protection and comfort for our best friends' feet come in the form of Cavallo Hoof Boots." Tammy Sronce from ACTHA said, "ACTHA has enjoyed a long term partnership with Cavallo. More and more ACTHA members are riding in their Cavallo Hoof Boots. We hear very positive feedback on the performance of Cavallos - that they are the most 'user friendly' hoof boot

title: Best of America by Horseback's 1000th Episode!
text: Best of America by Horseback invites riders from all over the world to come and join in their special celebration ride. Cavallo has partnered with BOABH, as seen on RFD TV, for many years and the team at Cavallo are proud to call Tom and Pat Seay and all the BOABH team as friends. Cavallo Hoof Boots are the Official Hoof Boots of BOABH. In September this year they will be airing their 1000th episode which is going to be a major celebration and YOU are invited. As part of this milestone BOABH want to list EVERY rider and horse that has been part of their wonderful journey. Please take the time to read this letter to be sure you don’t miss out on the celebration! Dear Friends of Cavallo Horse & Rider and Best of America by Horseback: We will be announcing in a few days, a grand celebration trail ride!! We are at our 1,000th airing of our television show and want to use this very special occasion to celebrate all of our trail riders!! The "Tribute to the Trail Rider" event will be held in Cleveland, Ohio in cooperation with the Cuyahoga County Chapter of the Ohio Horsemen's Council this September! We are trying to contact every trail rider that has ever ridden with Best of America by Horseback over the years. Information from previous rides that was stored in our computer was lost due to a major storm a few years ago, resulting in a loss of many of our contacts and records. Theref

title: Stamp of Approval from Liberated Horsemanship
text: Cavallo President Carole Herder is proud to announce that Cavallo Hoof Boots have now received the Stamp of Approval from Liberated Horsemanship. Originally founded by Dr. Bruce Nock in 2003, Liberated Horsemanship provides training and services for hoof care professionals, bare hoof enthusiasts and horse people who are ready to learn and change. “The endorsements are flooding in,” comments Ms. Herder, “Receiving glowing reports from riders all over the world is now a daily occurrence. Cavallo Hoof boots are the boots of choice, not only for us everyday riders and competitors, but for the esteemed riding and training organizations who are marching ahead to create a new world of comfort and protection for horses feet. It’s not just about the comments and the accolades, I am personally thrilled because I now know that every day somewhere in the world a horse is freed of their metal shoes and given the protection and security that Cavallos provide. And with the help of people such as those at Liberated Horsemanship, the barefoot movement is a reality that horse owners can turn to with confidence to support a healthy fully-functioning natural hoof for the fortunate horses in their care.” Dr. Nock has been a Scientist for 39 years. He is an avid horseman—a dressage and trail rider and dressage instructor. He is the author of several books, including the acclaimed Ten Golden Rules of

title: Never Leave Home Without Your Hoof Boots
text: I never leave home without my horse's Cavallo hoof boots. The horses know what they are for and hold up their hoofs for application. As a rider I believe we should do all we can to make our horse's experience as enjoyable for them as it is for us. A lot of the trails we ride in my area are canopy trails which means there are roots and limbs that can be just as uncomfortable for a barefoot horse as it would be for us. I love my horses and they love their Cavallos. I carry a spare pair and have on occasion loaned them to another rider and saved the day for them and their horse. It made them believers and they ordered their horse a pair the next day. Lyndal Odom, Florida USA

title: Hoof Boots for All Disciplines
text: I raise quarter horses and paints. I train them and give riding lessons. We show Western Pleasure, Showmanship, Trail, English, Mountain and Ranch Trail,Ranch Horse and we also trail ride. I have clients in Washington and Arizona. I have used your hoof boots for three years and I absolutely love them. They are easy to get on and off, stay on well and give the best protection to the horses feet that I have found. I recommend them to all my friends and clients. - Debbie Gumm, Arizona

title: Gaiting and Hoof Boots
text: The horse in this photo is 'Gunner', my 21 year old Tennessee Walking Horse who had been wearing steel shoes for the past 18 years. He made the transition to hoof boots smoothly the first time I rode him in them. I know he's comfortable wearing them because for the first time in the 13 years I have owned him, he gaited on a gravel road! Before Cavallo, he didn't even want to walk on a gravel road, much less gait on one. I use these boots on both of my Tennessee Walking Horses and they gait just as well, if not better with them on. I love these because they are super easy to put on and take off and they actually STAY on! It doesn't matter how long I ride, they stay put. I use the pastern wraps as well and I have not had any issues with rubbing or sores, even after all day rides! - Dana Jones, Oregon

title: Hoof Boots in Texas
text: June 1-3 was Amerequine at the Will Rogers Memorial Center in Fort Worth, Texas. President Carole Herder was a presenter on all 3 days of the event, discussing “The Benefits of Barefoot.” A highlight of the show was meeting and working with “Taffy,” a beautiful rescue mare. DVM Jennifer Williams from Bluebonnet Equine Humane Society was kind enough to donate her time and this beautiful rescue horse to show the audience how to measure, size and fit for Cavallo Hoof Boots. Taffy had never had boots on before and at first lifted her foot high, but after a few turns in the ring she relaxed and enjoyed the comfort that Cavallo Hoof Boots provide! The wonderful staff at Bluebonnet Equine Humane Society share in Cavallo’s mission to improve the lives of equines everywhere! You can visit their website at http://www.bluebonnetequine.org/index.php/about/behs-mission for more information about their program.

title: Cavallo and Friends
text: At this year’s Amerequine Expo at the Will Rogers Memorial Center in Fort Worth, Texas, President Carole Herder met with one of our good friends, Cyndy Branham of R&D Ranch. Cyndy is a certified Trainer/Clinician and is well known for her participation in the Extreme Mustang Makeover and ACTHA’s Favorite Trail Horse Competitions. She was Top female competitor and finalist at the Extreme Mustang Makeover 2008, Reserve Champion at the Mustang Magic 2009 and Finalist at the Supreme Extreme Mustang Makeover in 2010. Cyndy shares in our belief that alleviating any discomfort in horses is an integral part of training and ultimately having a successful relationship with your horses and to that end highly praises Cavallo products! You can check out all the great work Cyndy is doing on her website at www.rockin-rc.com .

title: Dressage in Hoof Boots
text: About two years ago, while shopping at my local feed store I was wishing there were sneakers for horses. My horse Chuey had been barefoot for about a year and, while his feet were healthier than they had ever been, he was still sensitive to the rocks on our trails. I had a feeling I should look in the boot section of the store and there they were! Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots! Those boots lasted nearly two years and I just received our second pair. Chuey and I trail ride and do dressage work. These boots never move even when Chuey bucks and spins in the turnout. When he wears his booties, Chuey's strides are longer and more suspended. I couldn't be happier with the Cavallo Simple Boots. Thank you! Janet, San Pedro, California

title: Hoof Boots and Gypsies
text: Your boots are so much better than any other boot I have tried! Thank you so much!! My horse is a Gypsy Vanner horse and he has notoriously big feet and he's hard to fit. Sure enough, I measured his foot like you instruct and the hoof boots fit him wonderfully. Now he can do his wonderful trot on gravel and not stumble or act like he's in pain. They are great for parades also! My horse who's name is 'Emo' is very popular in parades and I am constantly asked by people with sharp eyes 'where did you get those boots!' I call them Emo's sneakers. They are so well made. Thank you again! Kristy & Emo

title: Hoof Boots put "Pep in her Step"
text: I absolutely love my Simple Hoof Boots and so does my horse! She has sensitive front feet and it was very uncomfortable for her to walk on the gravel roads around my neighborhood so I quit taking her out. I researched and found Cavallo boots and when I first ordered the incorrect size, ya'll were SO nice about trading them out for a bigger size. The process couldn't be easier. I put the new ones on her and they are so easy to put on and after she wore them around the pasture a bit to break them in this past week, I rode her out in them and she looked shocked that she didn't have to stumble over the rocky surface any longer. She had a pep in her step and was excited to get out of the ring again! Thank you so much Cavallo! -Amy Gosnell, Leicester, NC

title: Gunnar the Friesian and his Hoof Boots
text: LOVE THE SPORT HOOF BOOTS!!! I was a bit concerned when measuring my 16.1hh Friesian, Gunnar for Cavallo boots for his comfort as we get thru the summer drought when grass sugars peak. Looked like size 6 might be too small but took a chance. So glad I did! They fit with enough room to easily go on without a struggle and took less than 15 minutes for him to acclimate. He feels secure and comfortable in them. Now we can ride anywhere ( except in competition) without concerns. This is important because we do demos and can't always know ahead of time what the footing will be. Very happy! - Leslie Berro, Davidson, NC
